payload.label: dining table

payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped view of a rectangular dining/island table with a light wood (butcher-block or laminated) top that slightly overhangs a dark stained wooden cabinet-style base with vertical panel doors; a small white rectangular sticker or outlet cover is visible on the right side and a wooden chair is partially visible at the left — camera roughly 1.5 m away.
